data_sources.description: Enron-style email export: file + message columns
On-disk messages referenced by parquet file column

learning_outputs.description: Thread- and keyword-derived tasks aligned to registry workflows

skills_learned_or_updated.method: LLM synthesis from task bundle + docs/specs/PROMPT_TEMPLATES.md (example)

method_summary: Tasks inferred from corpus keywords and threading; agents from registry/registry.json; optional LLM step to draft SKILL updates with human review.
public_claims: This build used the email datasets and agent definitions listed in learning/last_run_manifest.json.
New or updated skills reference that manifest and task evidence; versions are in SKILL.md front matter.
